last_added.title: The US and Iran are now trading direct strikes — three American troops killed, and Washington bombs Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz
India signals the Indus Waters Treaty 'won't survive in its present form' — hardening its freeze on the water pact with Pakistan

Dozens feared dead after an overloaded ferry sinks off Guyana — 67 rescued, but no survivors found since
